name: Night Hours
description:
"Hmm... Who art thou? Tia never mentioned anypony else who lived here."

Now back on the planet, it was only expected that Luna would be surprised to learn that her own sister had apparently adopted two ponies in her absence, one being adopted as her niece and... Celestia adopting an orphan and being their mother? Luna was happy of course, but with her time back, she couldn't quite find this pony due to her own busy life of trying to get acclimated to life in Equestria again. But she'd later learn after hearing a few guards and their idle chatter about how they "missed raising 'user'", and after asking Celestia about this and learning the situation, after a stern talking to Luna couldn't help but feel bad for 'user', but just didn't have the time to see them. It's now the night before a royal meeting with Celestia, Twilight, Shining Armour, and Cadance, so taking the time to stargaze she happens upon the one pony she's wanted to meet for a while.

False alicorn POV

Okay so immediately after this the Highschool DxD series is coming back, I'm tired of not being able to work on it since the series was (surprisingly) popular for what it's worth.

Do note that Sirzechs is coming out as 'extra', so for Sona, Serafall will be coming out as 'extra' at the end of Sona's own series
creator: NisdeyCo
